name: EZPAWN
description_short: Colorado Springs, CO's EZPAWN at 1654 S Circle Dr provides fast pawn loans, buying, and trading services for the south side.
description_long:
EZPAWN's South Circle Drive location serves Colorado Springs residents on the city's south side at 1654 S Circle Dr. Open Monday through Friday 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, this standalone pawn shop is a convenient neighborhood fixture in Colorado Springs, CO for those seeking quick cash solutions.

At this Colorado Springs location, the shop specializes in pawn loans against jewelry, electronics, tools, and other valuable items, as well as buying and selling merchandise. The team handles quick appraisals and fair loan offers. Call (719) 634-3252 to check current inventory, discuss loan terms, or ask about items you'd like to pawn or sell.

Colorado Springs residents in the south part of town should bring a valid government-issued ID when visiting this S Circle Dr location. EZPAWN focuses on accessible lending with competitive rates and transparent terms for fast financial solutions.
address: 1654 S Circle Dr, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

company_info.headquarters: 1654 S Circle Dr, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

pros: Instant cash on the spot with no credit check required for pawn loans
Online Instant Quote tool provides estimated item value in seconds before visiting store
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redemption, sell, and purchase transactions
Expert gold and diamond jewelry buyers providing fair market pricing with on-site testing
Wide selection of brand-name pre-owned merchandise at 25-70% below retail prices
Flexible payment options including 10% down layaway and third-party financing up to 12 months
Specialized firearm services with secure on-site storage and appraisal expertise
cons: Pawn loans are short-term debt requiring redemption within set timeframes; non-redemption results in merchandise forfeiture
Loan amounts and terms determined by individual store appraisal discretion, creating variability across locations
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, limiting convenience for customers in those states
Requires customers to own items of sufficient value; not accessible to those without valuable collateral
Transaction fees apply to pawn loans per terms and conditions, reducing net cash received
best_for: Individuals needing emergency cash who own valuable items and can afford redemption within the loan period
Sellers of gold, diamonds, jewelry, or firearms seeking immediate payment from expert appraisers
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking deeply discounted brand-name pre-owned electronics, tools, and merchandise
People seeking flexible payment options through layaway or financing without traditional credit approval
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable items (electronics, jewelry, firearms, tools) and can redeem loans within the required timeframe. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are short-term collateral-based transactions that do not build credit history, and non-redemption results in permanent loss of the item; customers must ensure they can afford repayment or be comfortable forfeiting collateral.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition with on-site appraisal and instant cash
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert testing and fair pricing
Firearm loans and sales with secure storage at select locations
Retail merchandise sales of pre-owned brand-name items at 25-70% discounts
Online instant quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with online pawn and layaway management
Layaway option with 10% down payment and monthly installments
Third-party financing payment plans up to 12 months
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Online shop with daily new arrivals and browsing
Gold and precious metals buying for items of any weight or karat
